description: Query -> expected-memory pairs (incl. paraphrases) proving recall@k(index) > recall@k(lexical). AC-C2 / AC-C12.

recallThreshold.note: Deterministic stub embedder (bag-of-token TF cosine). Assertion is recall@k(index) > recall@k(lexical); exact values recorded by the harness test.
